message:
feat(storage): add database health check, repair, and audit action types

Adds three major storage capabilities:

- Database health check (check_database_health): Runs SQLite quick
  integrity check, schema version validation, foreign key consistency
  check, FTS index integrity verification, and WAL status inspection.
  Returns a structured DbCheckReport with per-check status (Ok/Warning/
  Error) and details.

- Database repair types (DbRepairReport/DbRepairItem): Structured
  output for repair operations with backup tracking and per-repair
  success/failure status.

- AuditActionRecord type: Schema for recording audit trail entries
  including actor kind/ID, pane ID, domain, action kind, policy
  decision with reason, rule ID, input/verification summaries,
  decision context, and result. Used by the audit list renderer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
